theme: 一排薄胎闻香杯，为什么茶杯越来越像成年人的安静审美门槛

items.source: 01_午后侧光里排开的薄胎闻香杯.png
items.title: 午后侧光里排开的薄胎闻香杯
items.description: 一排极轻极薄的白瓷杯，已经足够把“安静审美门槛”画得很完整。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a row of ultra-thin aroma tea cups lined up in soft afternoon side light, translucent porcelain edges glowing, calm Xiaohongshu-worthy minimalism, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 手指捏起一只透光杯壁
items.description: 真正让人上头的不是喝什么茶，而是指尖捏起杯壁时那种几乎要透光的轻。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, fingers gently lifting a very thin porcelain aroma cup against window light, delicate translucency and tactile realism, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 03_木托盘上留出杯口弧线的影子.png
items.title: 木托盘上留出杯口弧线的影子
items.description: 杯口投下来的弧线影子，会让这组器物比很多复杂摆拍都更像收藏。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, thin aroma cups on a walnut tray casting curved shadows, clean composition, refined tabletop atmosphere, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 04_空茶席中央的一对高脚闻香杯.png
items.title: 空茶席中央的一对高脚闻香杯
items.description: 没有茶汤也成立的茶杯，才更像一种被认真筛选过的审美趣味。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, two elegant high-footed aroma cups centered on an empty tea mat, spacious composition, serene luxury without excess, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 05_洗净后倒扣沥水的一排白瓷杯.png
items.title: 洗净后倒扣沥水的一排白瓷杯
items.description: 倒扣晾水的时刻比正式开席更有生活感，也更像真实会被收藏转发的瞬间。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a row of cleaned white porcelain aroma cups upside down to dry, subtle water droplets, realistic domestic tea ritual, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 06_茶巾边缘靠着一只细高闻香杯.png
items.title: 茶巾边缘靠着一只细高闻香杯
items.description: 细高的杯型靠在茶巾边，像把成年人的克制和偏好都缩成了一件小器物。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a slender tall aroma cup resting near the edge of a tea towel, tactile linen and ceramic textures, intimate still-life mood, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 07_晨光里透出温度的空杯内壁.png
items.title: 晨光里透出温度的空杯内壁
items.description: 空杯内壁在晨光里发亮时，会让人立刻理解为什么有人只为杯型就反复比较。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, interior surface of an empty thin porcelain tea cup catching soft morning light, macro detail with realistic ceramic sheen, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 08_茶桌角落叠放的杯托和闻香杯.png
items.title: 茶桌角落叠放的杯托和闻香杯
items.description: 杯托和闻香杯叠在一起的秩序感，本身就很有保存和模仿价值。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, stacked cup rests and thin aroma cups at the corner of a tea table, organized tactile arrangement, warm neutral palette, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 09_朋友来前先排好的六只白杯.png
items.title: 朋友来前先排好的六只白杯
items.description: 提前排好的六只白杯，会让聚会看起来更像一场被郑重对待的小型仪式。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, six thin white aroma cups prepared before friends arrive, quiet anticipation, elegant social tabletop realism, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 10_靠窗书桌上的一只单杯和旧书.png
items.title: 靠窗书桌上的一只单杯和旧书
items.description: 一只单杯和一本旧书放在一起时，茶器就不只是器物，而像一种自我想象。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a single thin aroma cup on a window-side desk beside an old book, literary still-life atmosphere, soft daylight, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 11_深色木桌上留白很大的小白杯.png
items.title: 深色木桌上留白很大的小白杯
items.description: 小白杯放在大片深木留白里，会让人立刻停下来，因为安静本身也能制造冲击。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, tiny white thin-walled tea cup on a dark wooden table with generous negative space, minimalist dramatic composition, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 12_收席前并排擦拭的最后两只闻香杯.png
items.title: 收席前并排擦拭的最后两只闻香杯
items.description: 最后两只被并排擦干的小杯，会让整组图像有一种成年人收束情绪的结尾感。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, final two thin aroma cups being wiped dry before putting away the tea setup, gentle hands, evening calm, realistic ritual ending, no logos, no readable text.
